# FlowVault - n8n workflow library and reliability layer

## What is FlowVault?
A library of reusable n8n workflows, plus the reliability layer that will grow around the FlowVault Audit MCP wedge. Skip starting from scratch and reuse systems that are built to ship.

## Key Features
- Curated n8n workflows
- Reliability layer for workflow quality
- Audit MCP wedge for workflow JSON checks
- Filter by platform, level, popularity
- 3 free downloads/month
- Pro plan for unlimited downloads

## Categories
- Content Creation
- Data Processing
- Integrations
- AI Automation
- Notifications
- And more...

## Pricing
- Free: 3 downloads/month
- Pro: Unlimited downloads

## Contact
Built by NordSym AB
Website: https://flowvault.se
